Table of Contents

Interface IImageRegistration

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control an image registration.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("EC48C884-EBEB-4D94-849E-F1533A0A32DA")]
public interface IImageRegistration

Properties

BlockingType

The blocking/sampling type for large images.

esriImageBlockingType BlockingType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriImageBlockingType

Examples

Sample Snippet

Parameters

The image registration parameters.

IPropertySet Parameters { get; set; }

Property Value

IPropertySet

Examples

Sample Snippet

Refinement

The match point refinement to be applied.

esriMatchPointRefinementType Refinement { get; set; }

Property Value

esriMatchPointRefinementType

Examples

Sample Snippet

ServerObjectName

The ArcGIS server object to perform image registration.

IName ServerObjectName { get; set; }

Property Value

IName

Examples

Sample Snippet

ThreadCount

The number of instances for image registration.

int ThreadCount { get; set; }

Property Value

int
